requirement_topic.en: Radio / Telecom Type Approval — MICT (Ministry of Technology and Communications, ກະຊວງເຕັກໂນໂລຊີ ແລະ ການສື່ສານ) and MICT Department of Telecommunications
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电/电信型号批准 — MICT（科技通信部，ກະຊວງເຕັກໂນໂລຊີ ແລະ ການສື່ສານ）暨MICT电信局
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電/電信型號批准 — MICT（科技通訊部，ກະຊວງເຕັກໂນໂລຊີ ແລະ ການສື່ສານ）暨MICT電信局

summary.en: The Lao Ministry of Technology and Communications (MICT, ກະຊວງເຕັກໂນໂລຊີ ແລະ ການສື່ສານ) requires mandatory type approval for all radio and telecommunications equipment placed on the Lao market, including Wi-Fi routers, Bluetooth devices, cellular terminals, LoRa modules, and similar IoT radio equipment. The MICT Department of Telecommunications (Lao Telecommunications Department) administers device registration and type approval, having absorbed the former role of LNTA (Lao National Telecommunications Authority). Importation of unapproved radio or telecommunications equipment is prohibited under the Lao Telecommunications Law. MICT manages the national radio frequency allocation in coordination with NRTC (National Radio and Television Committee). Laos partially aligns with ASEAN harmonised frequency bands under the ASEAN Digital Masterplan 2025 but maintains its own national regulatory process. No mutual recognition arrangement (MRA) with China, CE, or FCC approval areas is known to be in force for MICT type approval as of mid-2026. Products must be separately approved by MICT for the Lao market regardless of any existing foreign type approvals. The China-Laos Railway (opened December 2021, Boten/Mohan border crossing) has substantially increased direct electronics imports from China but does not alter the legal MICT approval requirement.
summary.zh: 老挝科技通信部（MICT，ກະຊວງເຕັກໂນໂລຊີ ແລະ ການສື່ສານ）要求投入老挝市场的所有无线电和电信设备（包括Wi-Fi路由器、蓝牙设备、蜂窝终端、LoRa模块及类似物联网无线设备）强制进行型号批准。MICT电信局（老挝电信局）负责管理设备注册和型号批准，已承接原LNTA（老挝国家电信局）的相关职能。依据老挝电信法，禁止进口未经批准的无线电或电信设备。MICT与NRTC（国家广播电视委员会）协调管理国家无线电频率分配。老挝依据东盟数字总规划2025部分与东盟协调频段接轨，但保留自身国家监管程序。截至2026年中，MICT型号批准与中国、CE或FCC批准地区之间尚无已知有效的互认协议（MRA）。产品须由MICT就老挝市场单独批准，无论其已持有何种外国型号批准。中老铁路（2021年12月开通，磨丁/磨憨口岸）大幅增加了来自中国的电子产品直接进口，但不改变MICT批准的法律要求。
summary.zht: 寮國科技通訊部（MICT，ກະຊວງເຕັກໂນໂລຊີ ແລະ ການສື່ສານ）要求投入寮國市場的所有無線電和電信設備（包括Wi-Fi路由器、藍牙設備、蜂窩終端、LoRa模組及類似物聯網無線設備）強制進行型號批准。MICT電信局（寮國電信局）負責管理設備註冊和型號批准，已承接原LNTA（寮國國家電信局）的相關職能。依據寮國電信法，禁止進口未經批准的無線電或電信設備。MICT與NRTC（國家廣播電視委員會）協調管理國家無線電頻率分配。寮國依據東盟數字總規劃2025部分與東盟協調頻段接軌，但保留自身國家監管程序。截至2026年中，MICT型號批准與中國、CE或FCC批准地區之間尚無已知有效的互認協議（MRA）。產品須由MICT就寮國市場單獨批准，無論其已持有何種外國型號批准。中寮鐵路（2021年12月開通，磨丁/磨憨口岸）大幅增加了來自中國的電子產品直接進口，但不改變MICT批准的法律要求。

standards_or_laws: Lao PDR Telecommunications Law (2011 and amendments) — mandatory type approval for radio and telecommunications equipment; administered by MICT Department of Telecommunications
MICT radio and telecommunications equipment type approval procedures — pre-import approval required for all wireless transmitting and receiving devices entering the Lao market
Lao National Radio Frequency Allocation Table — administered by MICT in coordination with NRTC (National Radio and Television Committee)
ASEAN Digital Masterplan 2025 — ASEAN-level frequency harmonisation framework (Laos is a signatory member state)

summary.en: In China, wireless and telecom devices require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission, under MIIT) radio model type approval covering radio frequency parameters, transmission power, and spectrum use. Telecom terminal equipment additionally requires a MIIT network access license (NAL, 网络接入许可证). IT equipment subject to mandatory CCC certification must also hold a valid CCC certificate issued by a CNCA-designated certification body. Test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories are required. Applicable standards include the GB 15629 series for WLAN/Wi-Fi, YD/T series for telecom terminals, and related MIIT regulatory framework standards. These Chinese approvals confirm compliance with Chinese national frequency allocations and GB/YD/T technical standards but carry no regulatory recognition in Laos.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电和电信设备须取得SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会，工业和信息化部下属）无线电型号核准，涵盖无线电频率参数、发射功率及频谱使用。电信终端设备还须取得工业和信息化部网络接入许可证（NAL）。须进行CCC强制认证的IT设备还须持有国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）指定认证机构颁发的有效CCC证书。须提供来自CNAS认可实验室的检测报告。适用标准包括WLAN/Wi-Fi适用的GB 15629系列、电信终端适用的YD/T系列及相关工业和信息化部监管框架标准。上述中国核准确认符合中国国家频率分配及GB/YD/T技术标准，但在老挝不具任何监管认可效力。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電和電信設備須取得SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會，工業和信息化部下屬）無線電型號核准，涵蓋無線電頻率參數、發射功率及頻譜使用。電信終端設備還須取得工業和信息化部網路接入許可證（NAL）。須進行CCC強制認證的IT設備還須持有國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）指定認證機構頒發的有效CCC證書。須提供來自CNAS認可實驗室的檢測報告。適用標準包括WLAN/Wi-Fi適用的GB 15629系列、電信終端適用的YD/T系列及相關工業和信息化部監管框架標準。上述中國核准確認符合中國國家頻率分配及GB/YD/T技術標準，但在寮國不具任何監管認可效力。

standards_or_laws: SRRC radio model type approval — State Radio Regulation Commission, MIIT (mandatory for all wireless transmitting devices sold in China)
MIIT network access license (NAL, 网络接入许可证) — mandatory for telecom terminal equipment sold in China
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — CNCA decisions for applicable IT and communications equipment categories
GB 15629 series — wireless LAN (WLAN / Wi-Fi) standards (SAC / MIIT)
YD/T series — telecom terminal technical standards (MIIT)

gap.en: Chinese SRRC, MIIT/NAL, and CCC approvals are not recognised by Lao MICT and do not substitute for Lao type approval. CCC and CE marks have no regulatory standing in Laos. The Lao national radio frequency allocation may differ from China's in specific sub-bands (particularly 5 GHz U-NII sub-bands and certain LTE/5G NR bands), requiring Lao-specific frequency compliance verification before import. MICT type approval procedures, processing timelines, applicable fees, and required documentation — including test report formats and sample submission requirements — should be confirmed directly with the MICT Department of Telecommunications, as the process may not be fully accessible online and is subject to change. No China-Laos MRA for radio or telecom type approval is known to be in force as of mid-2026. Lao-language product labelling displaying the MICT type approval reference is expected for consumer products sold on the Lao market.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC、工业和信息化部/NAL及CCC核准不被老挝MICT认可，不能替代老挝型号批准。CCC和CE标志在老挝不具监管效力。老挝国家无线电频率分配在特定子频段（尤其是5 GHz U-NII子频段和某些LTE/5G NR频段）上可能与中国存在差异，须在进口前进行老挝特有的频率合规核实。MICT型号批准程序、处理时限、适用费用及所需文件（包括检测报告格式和样品提交要求）应直接向MICT电信局确认，相关程序可能无法完全在线获取且随时可能变更。截至2026年中，尚无中老无线电或电信型号批准互认协议生效。在老挝市场销售的消费品预期须以老挝语标注MICT型号批准参考信息。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC、工業和信息化部/NAL及CCC核准不被寮國MICT認可，不能替代寮國型號批准。CCC和CE標誌在寮國不具監管效力。寮國國家無線電頻率分配在特定子頻段（尤其是5 GHz U-NII子頻段和某些LTE/5G NR頻段）上可能與中國存在差異，須在進口前進行寮國特有的頻率合規核實。MICT型號批准程序、處理時限、適用費用及所需文件（包括檢測報告格式和樣品提交要求）應直接向MICT電信局確認，相關程序可能無法完全在線獲取且隨時可能變更。截至2026年中，尚無中寮無線電或電信型號批准互認協議生效。在寮國市場銷售的消費品預期須以寮語標注MICT型號批准參考資訊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — MICT type approval (administered by MICT Department of Telecommunications) required before importation and sale of all radio and telecommunications equipment in Laos; importation of unapproved equipment is prohibited under the Lao Telecommunications Law
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio model type approval + MIIT network access license (NAL) required for wireless/telecom devices sold in China; CCC mandatory for applicable IT and communications equipment categories (CNCA/SAMR)

source.publisher: Ministry of Technology and Communications (MICT), Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] MICT type approval is the primary mandatory compliance gate for all wireless and telecommunications devices entering Laos. Chinese SRRC, MIIT/NAL, CCC, and CE approvals are not recognised and do not substitute for Lao MICT approval. Exporters must engage the MICT Department of Telecommunications directly for each wireless or telecom model and verify Lao national frequency band compatibility. No China-Laos MRA is known to be in force. The China-Laos Railway (Boten/Mohan) facilitates logistics but does not alter the legal type approval requirement. Lao-language labelling with MICT approval reference is expected for consumer products. Verified: false — confirm current MICT procedures and fee schedules before relying on this row.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] MICT型号批准是所有无线和电信设备进入老挝的首要强制合规门槛。中国SRRC、工业和信息化部/NAL、CCC及CE核准均不被认可，不能替代老挝MICT批准。出口商须就每个无线电或电信型号直接联系MICT电信局，并核实老挝国家频段兼容性。尚无已知的中老互认协议生效。中老铁路（磨丁/磨憨）便利了物流，但不改变型号批准的法律要求。消费品须以老挝语标注MICT批准参考信息。已核实：否——在依赖本行内容前，请确认MICT当前程序和收费标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] MICT型號批准是所有無線和電信設備進入寮國的首要強制合規門檻。中國SRRC、工業和信息化部/NAL、CCC及CE核准均不被認可，不能替代寮國MICT批准。出口商須就每個無線電或電信型號直接聯繫MICT電信局，並核實寮國國家頻段兼容性。尚無已知的中寮互認協議生效。中寮鐵路（磨丁/磨憨）便利了物流，但不改變型號批准的法律要求。消費品須以寮語標注MICT批准參考資訊。已核實：否——在依賴本行內容前，請確認MICT當前程序和收費標準。
